'''Squeak''' was a [[Tintinna/Legends|Tintinna]] (Tin-Tin Dwarf) messenger who worked for [[Big Bunji/Legends|Big Bunji]]. On the day that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] were to transport [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] to [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], Squeak met the smuggler in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] to offer him a cargo of [[Chak-root/Legends|chak-root]].
